summary: Iter67 Portfolio Intelligence Phase 1 validated. Backend 20/20 green (11 iter66 regression + 9 new portfolio-intel) including /api/portfolio-intel/{asset POST, owned GET, asset/{id}/valuation PUT, signal POST, portfolio-signal POST, exit-plan POST, action-plan POST}. Claude Sonnet 4.5 + deterministic fallbacks both verified — signal contains action verb (Hold/Sell/Refinance/Renovate/Optimize/Watch); exit-plan returns all 11 required keys (recommended_listing_price_eur, realistic_offer_low_eur, realistic_offer_high_eur, target_buyer_profile, documents_to_prepare[], design_improvements[], income_proof[], best_selling_angle, furnished_recommendation, expected_timeline_days, final_recommendation); action-plan returns exactly 5 steps each with n/title/detail. Mongo _id correctly stripped from /asset and /owned responses. Frontend: /portfolio renders kicker + demo-data-badge + H1 + AI signal bar + 4 CTAs + 12 KPIs (all kpi-* testids) + decision-card-0 + portfolio-intel-holdings with 3 demo asset cards (owned-koukaki-str, owned-glyfada-flat, owned-paros-cottage) — each with asset-intel-{id}/asset-intel-title-{id}/asset-intel-open-{id}/asset-intel-action-strip-{id}/if-sold-today-{id}/comparison-bars-{id}/equity-graph-{id}/asset-value-pulse-{id}. /asset/owned-koukaki-str renders all 6 tabs (overview/valuation/income/exits/action/docs), valuation override flow works end-to-end (PUT intercepted 200 → UI updates), all 7 scenario cards (scenario-sell-today through scenario-optimize-str), all 9 doc-row-0..8. /portfolio/add renders all 17 field-* testids + add-asset-submit; submit fires POST /api/portfolio-intel/asset with valid payload and navigates to /asset/{new_id}. Palette pivot verified — logomark fill is #B8956A (gold), zero #0F52FF occurrences in rendered HTML on /portfolio. Logomark + footer testids present.

ui_bugs.issue: Spec required testids score-asset, score-sell, score-liq, score-conf on the 4 score circles, and stat-gross/stat-net/stat-monthly/stat-occ/stat-adr/stat-yoc/stat-yonow/stat-mortgage on MiniStats. Visual elements render correctly (92/87/High/High and €24K/€16K etc all show), but these data-testid attributes are NOT present. Tests that target these selectors will fail. Either add the testids or update the test spec.

Spec required data-testid="asset-detail-ai-signal" wrapping the AI signal banner. The signal TEXT renders correctly (e.g. 'Hold. Strong 8.4% net yield…') but the testid is missing on its container, so any selector waiting on this element will time out.

Spec required testids action-step-1..action-step-5 on the 5 Claude-generated step rows. After clicking the Action Plan tab and waiting 8s for Claude to respond, zero action-step-N elements were found. The build-exit-plan-btn IS present. Either the testids are missing on the rendered step rows, or the Action Plan render is failing silently. Needs investigation.
Typography typo — H1 renders 'Know what you paid, what it is worth today,and what to do next.' (missing space after comma before 'and'). Likely missing whitespace between two JSX <span> nodes.

integration_issues.flow: Portfolio AI signal (/portfolio top of page)
integration_issues.issue: AI portfolio signal text remained 'Generating…' even after 8 seconds — Claude POST /api/portfolio-intel/portfolio-signal does return a sentence in <2s when called directly (verified in backend test), so the frontend either is not firing the call promptly or is not updating the React state when the response arrives. Note: live network was OK; signal eventually populates but not within the 5-second SLA called out by the review.

integration_issues.flow: Per-asset AI signal on Portfolio Intelligence cards
integration_issues.issue: All 3 cards still show 'Generating AI signal…' after 8s wait. Backend signal endpoint responds in <2s. Same pattern as above — frontend polling/state-update appears slow or stuck.

action_items: Add missing data-testid attributes on AssetIntelCard score circles (score-asset/sell/liq/conf) and MiniStats (stat-gross/net/monthly/occ/adr/yoc/yonow/mortgage) in PortfolioIntelligence.jsx — UI already renders correctly, only testids are missing.
Add data-testid="asset-detail-ai-signal" wrapper on the AI signal banner in AssetDetail.jsx (the text is already rendered, just missing the testid).

Investigate Action Plan tab — action-step-1..5 testids are missing entirely. Either render the 5 steps with those testids or fix the silent failure. Build Exit Plan button (build-exit-plan-btn) IS present, so the tab itself is loading.
Fix H1 whitespace bug in portfolio-intel-title — 'today,and' should be 'today, and' (add a space between the two adjacent <span> children).

Speed up the per-asset and portfolio AI signal population — backend responds in 1-2s but UI shows 'Generating…' for >8s. Either the fetch fires too late or the setState path is broken; suggest checking the useEffect dependency array.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/portfolio_intel.py is clean (374 lines, well under 700-line guideline). Mongo _id stripped via projection on /owned and via doc.pop('_id', None) on /asset POST — good.

/asset/{id}/valuation PUT correctly handles the synthetic demo case (returns 200 with is_demo_override=True when no DB row matches). This is important because the 3 demo asset IDs (owned-koukaki-str, owned-glyfada-flat, owned-paros-cottage) are frontend-only constants and not persisted.

_claude wrapper has a sensible fallback chain: missing EMERGENT_LLM_KEY → fallback string; LlmChat import fails → fallback; Claude call exception → fallback. Tested both paths via test_signal/test_portfolio_signal/test_exit_plan/test_action_plan — all return valid structured payloads.

_deterministic_action_steps in portfolio_intel.py uses an f-string label `f"detail"` on line 370 — this is dead code (the key 'detail' has an f-string prefix but no interpolation in the key itself). Harmless but stylistically odd; the detail VALUE is correctly an f-string. Recommend removing the f prefix on the key for clarity.

Frontend backend integration: AI signal endpoints respond in 1-2s per backend test but UI shows 'Generating…' for 8s+. Suggests the useEffect that fires the POST has a bad dependency (e.g. depends on a derived object that changes every render → request is throttled or never resolves to setState). Worth a console.log audit on PortfolioIntelligence.jsx and AssetIntelCard.

Test pollution risk: POST /api/portfolio-intel/asset persists to MongoDB without any TTL or test-mode flag. My initial test run created 2 TEST_* assets that suppressed the 3 demo-asset fallback on the frontend. Recommend adding a 'demo': false flag (already present in doc) plus a cleanup helper or test-mode env var. I cleaned up by deleting all owned_assets WHERE title regex ^TEST_.

success_rate.frontend: ~75% — major flows (Portfolio Intelligence renders, 3 demo assets, Asset Detail with 6 tabs, valuation override, exit scenarios, add asset POST + nav) all work; 4 testid groups missing (score-*, stat-*, asset-detail-ai-signal, action-step-1..5) and per-asset/portfolio AI signals stuck on 'Generating…' under 8s

seed_data_creation: TestPortfolioIntel.test_create_asset created 1 TEST_iter67 asset via POST /api/portfolio-intel/asset (cleaned up by main agent run via MongoDB delete_many on title regex ^TEST_). Re-running the suite will re-create it; cleanup helper recommended.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite for iter67 lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iter67_portfolio_intel.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env set. The suite includes iter66 regression + iter67 portfolio-intel. CRITICAL: before frontend-testing /portfolio, run `python -c "import asyncio, os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv('/app/backend/.env'); from motor.motor_asyncio import AsyncIOMotorClient; ..."` to delete any TEST_* docs from owned_assets — otherwise the 3-demo-asset fallback in lib/portfolioIntelligence.js (DEMO_OWNED_ASSETS) won't trigger and the page will show real assets instead. Demo asset IDs: owned-koukaki-str, owned-glyfada-flat, owned-paros-cottage — these are hard-coded constants on the frontend, NOT in MongoDB. AI Signal latency: backend responds 1-2s but UI shows 'Generating…' 8s+ — main agent needs to investigate the useEffect dependency chain in PortfolioIntelligence.jsx and AssetIntelCard. Claude exit-plan + action-plan endpoints can take 8-15s when calling Claude live — pytest timeout is 120s. Demo override path on PUT /api/portfolio-intel/asset/{demo_id}/valuation returns 200 with is_demo_override:True — this is the correct behaviour because demo asset IDs don't exist in DB.
rca of the issue: Two classes of frontend gaps found: (1) Missing data-testid attributes on rendered elements (score-* circles, stat-* MiniStats, asset-detail-ai-signal, action-step-N) — these are pure JSX attribute omissions; UI renders correctly but tests can't target the elements. Fix: add the testids in PortfolioIntelligence.jsx (AssetIntelCard component) and AssetDetail.jsx. (2) AI signal stuck on 'Generating…' for 8s+ despite backend responding in 1-2s — most likely a useEffect dependency bug where the fetch is fired but setState never runs (or fires after the timeout). Reproduction: load /portfolio, observe ai-portfolio-signal-text remains 'Generating…' for >5s. Mitigation: main agent should audit the useEffect that calls POST /api/portfolio-intel/portfolio-signal and POST /api/portfolio-intel/signal — verify the response is awaited, the state is set, and the dependency array is stable. (3) H1 whitespace bug — 'today,and' is missing a space between two adjacent JSX nodes. Fix: add a `{' '}` between the two spans or include a leading space in the second span.
